caption: The video depicts two individuals working diligently on a large ship, specifically near its bow where the number "44" is prominently displayed. Both are wearing orange life jackets and dark clothing, indicating they are likely crew members or dock workers. They are focused on handling a thick rope that is part of the ship's mooring system. The person on the left, wearing a brown cap, is bending over to assist the other individual, who is securing the rope around a bollard. Their coordinated efforts suggest they are preparing the ship for docking or undocking. In the background, several people can be seen observing from the upper deck of the ship, adding to the sense of activity and teamwork in this maritime setting.
